footer.description: Curated book recommendations from your favorite curators
footer.affiliateText: We receive a commission on purchases made through our links. There are no additional costs for you. The commission helps us run this platform and continue to offer curated book recommendations.

favorites.title: My Favorites
favorites.confirmClearAll: Are you sure you want to delete all favorites? This action cannot be undone.
favorites.emptyDescription: Save books, curators, authors and more to find them here.

dashboard.errorDescription: An error occurred while loading this page. Please try again.

dashboardLanding.title: Dashboard | coratiert.de
dashboardLanding.metaDescription: Manage your Creator Bookstore, Author profiles and Publisher content - all in one place.
dashboardLanding.heroDescription: Create your own bookstore, manage your books as an author, or showcase your publishing program - all in one place.
dashboardLanding.creatorDescription: Your personal bookstore is already activated. Create reviews, share recommendations and build your community.
dashboardLanding.authorDescription: As a verified author, you get extended features for managing your books and interacting with your readers.
dashboardLanding.publisherDescription: As a publisher, you get professional tools for managing your program and presenting your authors.
dashboardLanding.infoCreatorText: Available immediately for all users. You can get started right away and create your own bookstore.
dashboardLanding.infoAuthorText: Request access with one click. We'll review your request and activate your author profile once we've verified your identity.
dashboardLanding.infoPublisherText: For publishers, we offer comprehensive management tools. After reviewing your request, you'll get access to the full publisher backend.

faq.heroSubtitle: Find answers to the most important questions about coratiert.de
faq.intro: Have a question that isn't answered here? Feel free to write to us at
faq.ctaDescription: We're happy to help! Contact us by email or check out our detailed help articles.

microcopy.shareNotSupported: Please copy the link manually from the address bar.

empty.noBooksDescription: There are no books here right now. Check back later or adjust your filters.
empty.noResultsDescription: No matching results were found for your search. Try different search terms.
empty.noFavoritesDescription: Save books, curators and more to find them here.
empty.noCuratorsDescription: No curators were found for this selection. Try different filters.
empty.noEventsDescription: There are no events planned at the moment. Check back soon.

error.genericDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
error.loadingDescription: The data could not be loaded. Please try again.
error.networkDescription: Could not connect to the server. Please check your internet connection.

confirm.delete: Are you sure you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.discard: Are you sure you want to discard your changes? Unsaved data will be lost.

meta.siteDescription: Discover curated book recommendations from people with passion and expertise.
